title: Docupilot API Vocabulary
description: Terms, schemas, and operations defined by the Docupilot API

show_demographic_prompt_for_organization.summary: Show demographic prompt for organization users

list_workspace_invitations.summary: List pending workspace invitations for the current user

delete_organization.summary: Delete a Organization and other related data permanently

initiate_authorization_sequence.summary: Initiate a re-authorization sequence that would verify authenticity of logged-in userin order to allow performing high security operations like delete workspace

get_user_organizations.summary: Get all organizations for the current user

nps_next_reminder.summary: Update the next NPS reminder time

get_exchange_session_code.summary: Exchange session for a migration code

delete_current_workspace.summary: Delete a workspace and other related data permanently

prompt_suggestions_online_builder_ai.summary: list prompt suggestions based on template name and description

prompt_suggestions_word_add_in_ai.summary: list prompt suggestions based on File Name and Content

list_content_block_sharing.summary: Get all shared permissions for specific content block

get_content_block_sharing.summary: Get specific permission details for given content block

update_content_block_editor_version.summary: Update the content block editor version between v1 and v2

upload_inline_image_of_content_block.summary: Upload inline image of content block

get_test_data_for_content_block.summary: Get test data used for testing content block

fetch_content_block_detail_by_key.summary: Get content block detail by API name (key)

list_folder_sharing.summary: Get all shared permissions for specific folder

get_folder_sharing.summary: Get specific permission details for given folder

get_user_created_folder_count.summary: Get the count of folders created by the user.

download_created_export_document.summary: download generated export document if available

get_template_delivery_count.summary: Get the count of deliveries linked to a template

update_template_editor_version.summary: Update the template editor version between v1 and v2

generate_test_data.summary: Generates a test data used for testing template

migrate_to_native_syntax.summary: Migrate DocuSign template to native signature delivery

delete_template_permanently.summary: Delete a template permanently from trash

get_test_data.summary: Get test data used for testing template

list_template_deliveries.summary: Get deliveries configured under this template

get_bulk_generation_draft.summary: Get a task saved as draft

get_mapping_data_based_on_delimiter.summary: Get Mapping Data based on Delimiter

sample_csv.summary: Generates a sample csv for the template using ai.

upload_for_bulk_generation.summary: Upload a new csv for bulk generate.

list_template_sharing.summary: Get all shared permissions for specific template

get_template_sharing.summary: Get specific permission details for given template

copy_template_from_version.summary: Copy template from version including preferences, deliveries

set_template_version_live.summary: Set a template version to live version

get_user_created_templates_count.summary: Get the count of templates created by the user.

download_exported_envelopes.summary: Download generated export envelopes if available

delete_envelope_permanently.summary: Delete a envelope permanently from trash

download_recipient_attachments.summary: Download all attachments of an envelope recipient as a zip file

get_envelope_responses.summary: Get consolidated field responses for an envelope

send_reminder.summary: Send a reminder for Envelope Signers

get_signing_link.summary: Get signing link for the envelope (sender self-sign)

envelope_count_by_status.summary: Get envelope count grouped by status

list_esign_folder_sharing.summary: Get all shared permissions for specific signature folder

get_esign_folder_sharing.summary: Get specific permission details for given signature folder

update_esign_folder_sharing_permission.summary: Update signature folder sharing permission partially

get_email_accounts.summary: Get verified email DNS accounts for eSign notifications

update_esign_email_account.summary: Update email account for eSign notifications

export_extension_run_responses.summary: Export extension run metadata and responses as Excel

get_extension_config_by_unique_id.summary: Get extension config by unique id
